allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "c:\\Users\\Enzo\\Documents\\f1000 transportadora\\public\\" -Recurse | Where-Object { $_.Extension -match '\\.\(png|jpg|jpeg|webp|svg|ico\)' } | Select-Object Name, DirectoryName, @{N='KB';E={[math]::Round\($_.Length/1KB,1\)}})

Bash(node -e "const { chromium } = require\('@playwright/test'\); \(async \(\) => { const b = await chromium.launch\(\); const p = await b.newPage\(\); await p.setViewportSize\({width:1440,height:900}\); await p.goto\('http://localhost:5173',{waitUntil:'networkidle'}\); await p.evaluate\(function\(\){ var all=document.querySelectorAll\('section'\); for\(var i=0;i<all.length;i++\){if\(all[i].textContent&&all[i].textContent.indexOf\('Quem Confia'\)>-1\){all[i].scrollIntoView\({behavior:'instant'}\);break;}} }\); await p.waitForTimeout\(1800\); await p.screenshot\({path:'C:/Users/Enzo/AppData/Local/Temp/f1000-verify/logos-color.png'}\); var loc=p.locator\('img[alt=\\"Cogera Energia\\"]'\).first\(\); await loc.hover\(\); await p.waitForTimeout\(600\); await p.screenshot\({path:'C:/Users/Enzo/AppData/Local/Temp/f1000-verify/logos-hover.png'}\); await b.close\(\); console.log\('done'\); }\)\(\);")
